prompt: 使用 product-delivery-skill-chain，从已有 PRD docs/member-renewal-prd.md 开始，继续生成技术设计、审核标准和任务归档。没有指定终点。
assertions: Records PRD as the requested entry stage and source artifact.
Skips requirement exploration with an explicit reason instead of restarting upstream work.
Maintains delivery-chain-status.md because the chain skill was invoked.
Plans technical design and audit standards after PRD approval, with parallel execution only if authorized and available.
Creates formal tasks after technical design by default.
Stops before coding and requests confirmation unless full-auto was explicitly authorized.
